title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Split up... Split up... Please, I'm beggin' ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This track is the widest one of them all. Which
means... I should be safe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby—one of the biggest events
in racing. Yet we're taking it on at arguably the
worst time possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Assuming there are no last-minute cancellations,
the Japanese Derby is guaranteed to have a full
gate. And Tamamo Cross is still in no condition to
fight a full pack.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm real sorry 'bout actin' up like this...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still in it to win it, don't you worry! I'll just
run alongside the rest of 'em...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no telling how she'll fare. But for now, the
most important thing to say is...
choice_data_list: Congratulations on getting into the Derby.
Congratulations on getting into the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Congrats? Can you really say that when my
runnin's a mess?
choice_data_list:
Yup, getting here means you're one of the top
eighteen racers of your generation.

Yup, getting here means you're one of the top
eighteen racers of your generation.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The top eighteen... Yeah, when ya put it like
that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I started at rock bottom, but today I'm runnin' in
the Derby... Even that's worth somethin'...
choice_data_list: Show your family what you're made of.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I bet they've got their eyes glued to the
screen right about now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Even if I lose, there's no way I'm lettin' 'em see me
wimp out on my big break. I... I...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I got this! For real! I'm gonna run the best I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We manage to boost our morale somehow. For
the time being, that's the best I can ask of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now all that's left is to bet on her appetite for
victory. Holding out hope, I send her off towards
Fuchu's giant zelkova trees.
